hero.title: Where MIRYA Creates Real Impact
hero.description: MIRYA brings intelligent, no-code automation that adapts to these realities, eliminating manual tasks and enabling teams to scale efficiently.

aiPowered.title: What MIRYA Automate
aiPowered.description: MIRYA's automation intelligence works across your existing tools and systems, powering end-to-end flows.

features.title: Reads & understands documents
features.description: MIRYA automatically reads, interprets, and extracts meaning from emails, PDFs, forms, spreadsheets, and even messy unstructured documents.

features.title: Updates & validates systems
features.description: From ERP and CRM platforms to HR software and long-standing legacy systems, MIRYA ensures every application stays up-to-date and synchronized.

features.title: Makes intelligent decisions
features.description: It evaluates business rules, interprets numerical data, applies logical conditions, understands natural language, and identifies patterns within complex workflows.

features.title: Handles Edge Cases Automatically
features.description: When data is missing, formats change, or systems behave unexpectedly, MIRYA adapts using logic, retries, and fallback paths instead of failing silently.

features.title: Learns From Outcomes
features.description: MIRYA observes results, detects patterns, and refines decisions—helping workflows become smarter, more accurate, and more efficient with every run.

features.title: Built for Reliability at Scale
features.description: Designed to run mission-critical automations continuously with built-in recovery, logging, and error handling that keep processes stable—even under high volume and long runtimes.

features.title: Coordinates workflows
features.description: Multi stage workflows become simple when MIRYA takes over. It captures inputs, configures the required steps, automates execution, and continuously monitors results.

features.title: Operates software like a human
features.description: MIRYA interacts with software applications just as a human would: clicking, typing, selecting, navigating, and processing data.

impact.title: Where MIRYA Creates Real Impact
impact.description: MIRYA brings intelligent, no-code automation to organizations that want to eliminate manual work, accelerate operations, and scale without increasing headcount. From data-heavy departments to service-driven industries MIRYA works everywhere.

industries.title: Industries We Empower
industries.description: From high-volume back office operations to customer facing workflows MIRYA adapts to every environment and every industry with ease.

list.title: Retail & E-Commerce
list.description: Optimize order processing, update stock in real time, simplify returns, and automate customer communication to keep every channel aligned.

list.title: Finance & Accounting
list.description: Automate invoice handling, perform reconciliations, run credit checks, and generate financial reports with consistent rule-based precision.

list.title: Public Sector
list.description: Accelerate case management, automate document workflows, and streamline citizen services with complete compliance.

list.title: Logistics & Mobility
list.description: Process booking emails, issue shipment updates, and manage operational workflows to increase speed and reduce coordination effort.

list.title: Customer Service
list.description: Classify and route inquiries, pre-draft responses, and eliminate manual triage — enabling agents to focus on high-value interactions.

list.title: Healthcare
list.description: MIRYA empowers healthcare departments by automating patient intake, documentation, insurance workflows, and clinical coordination.
